prompt:
I want to add rate limiting to the /api/users endpoint. It should use a sliding window algorithm with Redis. Here's my tech spec:

## Problem
No rate limiting on user API endpoints.

## Solution
Add sliding window rate limiter using ioredis.

## Tasks
1. Install ioredis dependency
2. Create RateLimiterService in src/common/rate-limiter.service.ts
3. Create RateLimiterGuard in src/common/rate-limiter.guard.ts
4. Apply guard to UsersController
5. Add unit tests for RateLimiterService

## Acceptance Criteria
- Given a client sends 100 requests within 60 seconds, when the 101st request arrives, then return 429 Too Many Requests
- Given the sliding window expires, when a new request arrives, then allow it through

assertions.name: detects_inline_spec
assertions.description: Recognizes the inline content as a tech-spec and routes to Quick Flow

assertions.name: saves_spec_to_file
assertions.description: Saves the inline spec as a tech-spec-*.md file in the correct directory

assertions.name: skips_spec_creation_step
assertions.description: Proceeds directly to Quick Flow Step 2, not Step 1

assertions.name: spawns_quick_developer
assertions.description: Spawns quick-developer sub-agent to implement the saved spec
